title: Press Release: Sitnasuak Gives Back – Our 2018 Community Donations
summary: Press Release: Sitnasuak Gives Back – Our 2018 Community Donations Nome, Alaska | December 21, 2018 Giving back to our community is very important to Sitnasuak Native Corporation and demonstrates our shared values of cooperation, sharing, respecting others, and pride in culture. During 2018, we are pleased to have shared more than $300,000 in donations to support nonprofits, schools, education prog...

title: Census of Agriculture Data Collection Tops NASS 2018 Accomplishments,Provides Advancements in Technology and Enhanced Customer Service
summary: In completing the Census of Agriculture data collection that is required every five years, the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s (USDA) National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) implemented customer-focused improvements in 2018 and plans to release the new Census of Agriculture data in February...

title: A Charitable Lunch
summary: On December 14, 2018, Chugach Alaska Corporation held a holiday lunch for their employees at corporate headquarters.
